title: Amtech N0140 480mm (19") Tool box
features: DURABLE: This 480mm (19") tool box is made from tough polypropylene for durability
VERSATILE: With a lift-out, removable carry tray, double-clip closure, carry handle and built-in organisation compartments, it is ideal for storing all kinds of tools
WORKSHOP FRIENDLY: Ideal for home use or trade environments
STABLE OPERATION: Designed to minimise movement during cutting tasks
TIME SAVING: Enhances productivity through fast and accurate cutting
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1x Toolbox (Includes tray) See more
